RemediationStrings.Title: AllowDomainPINLogon (Administrative Templates - System)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\AllowDomainPINLogon must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - System.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnumerateLocalUsers (Administrative Templates - System)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\EnumerateLocalUsers must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - System.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableSmartScreen (Administrative Templates - System)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\EnableSmartScreen must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - System.

RemediationStrings.Title: ShellSmartScreenLevel (Administrative Templates - System)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\ShellSmartScreenLevel must be Block. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - System.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowCustomSSPsAPs (Administrative Templates - System)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\AllowCustomSSPsAPs must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - System.

RemediationStrings.Title: RunAsPPL (Administrative Templates - System)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\RunAsPPL must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - System.
